# Left PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 109.131 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.9453
  biquad b0=1.00063624688 b1=-1.99686450956 b2=0.996279200532 a1=-1.99686450956 a2=0.996915447409
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 229.248 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 0.8716
  biquad b0=1.00296621416 b1=-1.98539615971 b2=0.982653450259 a1=-1.98539615971 a2=0.985619664424

  biquad b0=1.02418811392 b1=-1.87089744734 b2=0.858546855351 a1=-1.87089744734 a2=0.882734969274

  biquad b0=1.00024342537 b1=-1.99874462504 b2=0.998576437845 a1=-1.99874462504 a2=0.998819863211

  biquad b0=1.00139351941 b1=-1.99281577915 b2=0.991850637745 a1=-1.99281577915 a2=0.993244157155
